T001.did: Added .footer-generating-chip CSS — accent-tinted pill with pointer-events:none and a sized .btn-spinner child.

T002.did: Restructured the isGenerating early-return: Mark step complete moved to actions-left as a secondary Button; live indicator is now a non-clickable <span class="footer-generating-chip"> with role=status and a btn-spinner.

T003.did: Audited GeneratingPlan / GeneratingTasks / GeneratingArtifactReady / GeneratingTimedOut stories — navState shapes still trigger the branch and pick up the new layout automatically; refreshed two doc comments to describe the chip + secondary layout.

T004.did: Implementation supports all five edge cases per code review, but Extension-Development-Host visual verification (rapid step transitions, long-running implement, approve/inline-comment modes unchanged, status-detection failure, narrow widths) is a user-side manual gate.
concerns: Manual visual verification in the Extension Development Host (SC-001..SC-004) is the user's responsibility — install-local + step-dispatch each of specify/plan/tasks/implement and confirm the chip + left-secondary layout, plus narrow-viewer behavior.

T005.did: Updated the Generating-during-in-flight callout in docs/viewer-states.md to describe the chip (right) + secondary override (left) layout and its a11y attributes.

T006.did: Added an [Unreleased] / Changed CHANGELOG entry summarizing the visual-hierarchy fix for the in-flight footer.

anchor.heading: Feature Specification: Footer "Generating…" as status, "Mark step complete" as secondary
